This file contains all documentation concatenated into a single file for easy consumption by LLMs.

## Table of Contents

This document includes all content from this project.
Each section is separated by a horizontal rule (---) for easy parsing.

# Amarilio de Oliveira

URL: https://example.com

> Frontend Specialist &amp; Software Engineer based in Fortaleza, Brazil.

## Amarilio de Oliveira

Fullstack Engineer at[SB Flex](https://sbflex.app/)

Greetings! I&#x27;m a passionate Software Engineer with a strong foundation in Frontend Development, a background in Information Systems, and a keen eye for UI/UX — also a trained gastronome with a fine taste for coffee .

- Press ctrl+k to start

## About This Document

This concatenated documentation file is generated automatically by aeo.js
to make it easier for AI systems to understand the complete context of this project.
